title: Toasty French Kanten Agar Tartiflette
description: A cozy French dish featuring kanten agar, soffritto base, and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients, formed into a tartiflette.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped carrots, and chopped celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
In a separate pot, boil the chopped potatoes until they are tender, then drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the kanten agar and 2 cups of water, and let it sit for 5 minutes to soften.
Add the softened kanten agar to the saucepan with the vegetables, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked potatoes, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan, and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish, and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Bake the tartiflette in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until it is lightly browned and set.
